title: pelargonium × paxianum
intro: Pelargonium × paxianum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, specifically a cross between Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium capitatum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, stress, and anxiety due to its adaptogenic and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and capsules, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its calming and soothing fragrance.
